goals.short_name: Build and maintain a competitive and profitable agriculture and food sector

main_services.name: Grow and market a farm or food business
Get agriculture insurance and income protection
Buy and learn about local food

goals.short_name: B.C.'s agriculture and food sector manages risk and adapts to change

main_services.name: Keep livestock, crops and food safe
Resolve a farm practices or land use concern

goals.short_name: Fish and seafood are farmed, harvested and processed sustainably
Modernize B.C.'s liquor and cannabis licensing and enforcement system

main_services.name: Get a liquor or cannabis licence
Comply with liquor and cannabis rules

acts.summary: Governs licensing, food safety duties, traceability and enforcement for the handling and processing of fish, seafood and aquatic plants sold within B.C. Verified directly on bclaws.gov.bc.ca.

sections.title: Licensing and duties of operators
sections.description: Division 1 covers issuing, varying and reviewing licences for fish receivers, seafood processors and fisher vendors.

services.name: Get a fisher vendor licence to sell your catch directly

acts.summary: Governs licensing, permits and enforcement for liquor manufacturers, retailers, and licensed establishments and events. Replaced RSBC 1996, c 267. Verified directly on bclaws.gov.bc.ca.

sections.title: Licensing of establishments and events
sections.description: Provisions governing liquor licences and permits for restaurants, bars, manufacturers and special events, administered by the Liquor and Cannabis Regulation Branch.

services.name: Apply for a liquor licence or permit for your business or event
services.ms_name: Get a liquor or cannabis licence

sections.title: Inspections and enforcement
sections.description: Provisions enabling inspection, complaint investigation and enforcement action against licensees.

services.name: Report a liquor or cannabis compliance concern
services.ms_name: Comply with liquor and cannabis rules

acts.summary: Governs licensing, retail regulation and enforcement of non-medical cannabis in B.C. Citation corroborated via CanLII and the Liquor and Cannabis Regulation Branch's cannabis law and policy page.

sections.title: Licensing of cannabis retail and related activities
sections.description: Provisions governing cannabis retail store licences and authorizations.

services.name: Apply for a cannabis retail or production licence
services.ms_name: Get a liquor or cannabis licence

sections.title: Compliance and enforcement
sections.description: Provisions enabling inspection, complaint investigation and enforcement action against cannabis licensees.

services.name: Report a liquor or cannabis compliance concern
services.ms_name: Comply with liquor and cannabis rules

acts.full_name: Farm Practices Protection (Right to Farm) Act
acts.summary: Protects a farmer's right to conduct normal farm practices within the Agricultural Land Reserve and other designated farming areas, and establishes the BC Farm Industry Review Board complaint process. Verified directly on bclaws.gov.bc.ca.

sections.title: Determination of normal farm practice
sections.description: Sets out the right to farm test and the BC Farm Industry Review Board's process for hearing nuisance complaints.

services.name: Resolve a complaint about noise, odour or dust from a farm operation
services.ms_name: Resolve a farm practices or land use concern

acts.summary: Establishes the Provincial Agricultural Land Commission and governs the Agricultural Land Reserve, a provincial land use zone protecting agricultural land. Citation corroborated via CanLII and the ministry's 2026/27 Service Plan (Appendix A).

sections.title: Agricultural Land Reserve
sections.description: Provisions establishing the Agricultural Land Commission's mandate to preserve agricultural land and encourage farming.

services.name: Protect farmland through the Agricultural Land Reserve
services.ms_name: Resolve a farm practices or land use concern

acts.summary: Regulates food safety across B.C.'s food industry from agriculture and processing to retail and restaurants; the Ministry of Agriculture and Food administers the Act's Meat Inspection Regulation. Citation confirmed via the Ministry of Health's Food Safety Legislation page, which links directly to the bclaws.gov.bc.ca consolidation.

sections.title: Slaughter establishment licensing
sections.description: Graduated licensing of provincial slaughter establishments, administered by the Ministry of Agriculture and Food.

services.name: Get a meat inspection licence to operate a slaughter establishment
services.ms_name: Keep livestock, crops and food safe

sections.title: Food safety plans
sections.description: General duty of food establishments to ensure food safety and maintain documented food safety and sanitation plans.

services.name: Develop a food safety plan for your processing business
services.ms_name: Keep livestock, crops and food safe

acts.summary: Modernized animal disease control legislation (in force January 19, 2015) expanding provincial disease control authority, inspection, seizure, quarantine and emergency powers. Confirmed via a BC Gov News release fetched from news.gov.bc.ca.

sections.title: Disease control powers
sections.description: Provincial authority for inspections, seizures, quarantine and surveillance orders covering over 120 animal diseases.

services.name: Report and manage animal disease and health concerns
services.ms_name: Keep livestock, crops and food safe

acts.summary: Requires registration of apiaries and beekeepers, and gives inspectors powers to control bee disease. Verified directly on bclaws.gov.bc.ca.

sections.title: Registration of apiaries and beekeepers
sections.description: A person must not keep bees except in a registered apiary; sets out the registration and certification process.

services.name: Register your beehives
services.ms_name: Keep livestock, crops and food safe

acts.summary: Regulates the safety and licensing of milk and dairy products, together with the Milk Industry Standards Regulation. Citation confirmed via the Ministry of Health's Food Safety Legislation page, which links directly to the bclaws.gov.bc.ca consolidation.

sections.title: Dairy licensing and standards
sections.description: Licensing and inspection of dairy plants and dairy product standards.

services.name: Get a licence to operate a dairy, poultry, fur or game farming operation
services.ms_name: Keep livestock, crops and food safe
